pdf_summary.skipped_pages: Page 21 (sanitetski prevoz - single unclear row), Page 22 (DRG hospital codes - not applicable to a primary-care house), Pages 1, 23 (cover/signature pages)

code_strategy.approach: Mojkovac uses identical Cetinje code system as HN DZ (clinic 80). Reused HN DZ translations and used the X3 (non-insured patients) column. Insured patients pay through the state fund FZOCG and don't see prices on the public site — the X3 column is what self-paying users actually pay.
code_strategy.code_prefix: All clinic_medical_services.code values prefixed with MO_ to keep distinct.
code_strategy.price_observation: Used Cijena × 3 column. After multiplier, A01001 = €53.76 (vs HN DZ €39.00). Mojkovac X3 prices are similar order-of-magnitude to HN DZ prices.

application_steps: 1. Create the clinic row in DB (INSERT INTO clinics ...) and obtain its id
